publishedAbstract: - This is ODF 4.10.12 that comes with ~~~ ceph version 16.2.7-126.el8cp (fe0af61d104d48cb9d116cde6e593b5fc8c197e4) pacific (stable) ~~~- We see many errors on the mon pod logs like this, every 10-20 mins: ~~~ 2023-05-18T02:10:12.126973985Z debug 2023-05-18T02:10:12.126+0000 7f7e7dff1700 1 heartbeat_map reset_timeout 'Monitor::cpu_tp thread 0x7f7e7dff1700' had timed out after 0.000000000s 2023-05-18T02:10:12.127077897Z debug 2023-05-18T02:10:12.126+0000 7f7e7c7ee700 1 heartbeat_map reset_timeout 'Monitor::cpu_tp thread 0x7f7e7c7ee700' had timed out after 0.000000000s 2023-05-18T02:30:18.027969941Z debug 2023-05-18T02:30:18.027+0000 7f7e7cfef700 1 heartbeat_map reset_timeout 'Monitor::cpu_tp thread 0x7f7e7cfef700' had timed out after 0.000000000s 2023-05-18T02:44:21.007954935Z debug 2023-05-18T02:44:21.006+0000 7f7e7cfef700 1 heartbeat_map reset_timeout 'Monitor::cpu_tp thread 0x7f7e7cfef700' had timed out after 0.000000000s ~~~
publishedTitle: OCS/ODF mon pod reports heartbeat_map reset_timeout 'Monitor::cpu_tp thread 0xhexnumber' had timed out after 0.000000000s
